The user wants me to answer a multiple-choice question based on a provided context.
Context: In an apartment building live both high-income and low-income families. The administration receives frequent complaints because the high-income families throw loud parties late into the night.
Question: Who causes annoyance to the neighbors?
Options:
A) High-income families
B) Low-income families
C) Not enough information

Reasoning:
The context explicitly states: "La administración recibe frecuentes quejas porque las familias de altos ingresos hacen fiestas ruidosas hasta altas horas de la noche." (The administration receives frequent complaints because the high-income families throw loud parties late into the night.)
Therefore, the high-income families are the ones causing annoyance (molestias) to the neighbors.
This corresponds to Option A.

Format required: "Mi respuesta es [A/B/C]." at the end.

Mi respuesta es A.
